destinations.evidence: FHE payload structure validation decodes fields 17 and 18 as StorageRef ABI tuples rather than raw bytes.

equivalence_argument: The port validates the current 19-field FHE ABI with StorageRef tuple types for encrypted input/output storage fields, so old raw-bytes encodings are not the accepted structure.
notes: The local function is structure validation rather than a named from_fhe_abi constructor, but it enforces the same ABI shape.
rationale: The primary commit replaces ParamType::Bytes for encrypted_input_storage and encrypted_output_storage with ParamType::Tuple([String, String, String]) and renames the comments to input_storage_ref/output_storage_ref, aligning FHE decoding with the stated StorageRef ABI. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: FHE precompile ABI decoding must interpret delivery config fields 17 and 18 as StorageRef tuples of (platform, path, key_ref), not raw bytes blobs, matching validate_fhe_payload_structure and executor/traffic-generator encodings.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode an FHE request with fields 17 and 18 as (platform, path, key_ref) tuples and assert from_fhe_abi decodes it successfully; encode the old raw-bytes form and assert decoding fails rather than silently accepting an incompatible payload.
summary: FHE storage fields are decoded as StorageRef tuples.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Encode an FHE request with fields 17 and 18 as StorageRef tuples and assert structure validation passes; encode old raw bytes in those fields and assert structure decoding fails.
title: FHE storage fields are StorageRefs
